caption: We’re Building the Largest Developer by 2032 #unplugged #podcast #dubai #realestate #businessowner

What separates a company that just survives a downturn from one that comes out stronger? A question every leader faces. Few answer it honestly.

Dr. (CA) Ankur Aggarwal, Chairman & Founder of BNW Developments, does exactly that. In this conversation, he breaks down what it really takes to lead through disruption, scale with conviction, and build something lasting in one of the world’s most dynamic real estate markets.

From 12 projects and Dh32 billion in GDV launching across Ras Al Khaimah in 2026, to the market shifts that are quietly reshaping the industry, this goes beyond the headlines and into the decisions, risks, and hard-earned perspectives driving the next phase of growth.

And if you’re thinking about investing in the UAE right now? He shares exactly what he’d tell you. Honestly. Off the record.

Insightful. Direct. Unfiltered.

Watch the full eposide in the link in bio.

#UAE #RealEstate #BNWDevelopments #Resilience #Leadership

caption:
“Masters of Modern Influence” is more than a cover, it is a chronicle.

A chronicle of a young man shaped by a mentor, strengthened by brotherhood, and propelled by a legacy carefully crafted, brick by purposeful brick.

In this special issue, Ieshaan Sehgaal reflects on the figure who reshaped his vision and recalibrated his path: Ankur Agarwal, the mentor whose discipline, clarity, and leadership became the compass guiding his rise in Dubai’s most daring era of influence and innovation.

He speaks of a mother’s blessings that anchored him, a brother’s unwavering support that steadied him, and a mentor’s belief that ignited every milestone, the quiet forces behind every achievement, every pivot, every step toward becoming the man he is today.

This cover is a celebration of legacy and loyalty, of the rare alchemy that happens when the right people enter your life at the right moment.

A new era begins, and this is the story of the men who built it.

caption:
From a humble consulting startup to a real estate powerhouse, BNW Developments’ rise in under three years has been nothing short of remarkable. Today, the company stands tall as one of the Middle East’s most formidable real estate forces, managing assets worth over AED 22 Billion.

At the helm is Founder and Chairman Ankur Aggarwal, a Chartered Accountant turned real estate innovator whose sharp analytical acumen and future-forward thinking have redefined urban living. 

Joining him in shaping this vision is Vivek Anand Oberoi, Managing Director and Co-Founder, whose journey from a prodigious 11-year-old entrepreneur to acclaimed actor and now real estate visionary brings unmatched creativity and cultural perspective. 

Together, they are propelling BNW Developments toward a future where every project tells a story of cultural permanence.

- How he started with no background in real estate.
- How he built a team of over 150 agents in months.
- ⁠Why selling in luxury real estate is more psychology than sales?
- ⁠How he evaluates properties and chooses partners.
- ⁠What makes Dubai such a strong market for investment?
